span_mappings.nl_span: (Nat.fib (n+24) : ZMod 9) = Nat.fib n — Pisano period π(9)=24

formal_statement: theorem fib_nat_mod9_periodic (n : ℕ) : (Nat.fib (n + 24) : ZMod 9) = Nat.fib n
natural_language_claim: The Fibonacci sequence is periodic mod 9 with Pisano period 24: (Nat.fib (n+24) : ZMod 9) = Nat.fib n for all n.
